scripts.link:wasm:animation: pnpm --filter @vizij/animation-wasm run build && (cd npm/@vizij/animation-wasm && pnpm link --global)
scripts.link:wasm:graph: pnpm --filter @vizij/node-graph-wasm run build && (cd npm/@vizij/node-graph-wasm && pnpm link --global)
scripts.link:wasm:orchestrator: pnpm --filter @vizij/orchestrator-wasm run build && (cd npm/@vizij/orchestrator-wasm && pnpm link --global)
scripts.clean:wasm: pnpm run clean:wasm:animation && pnpm run clean:wasm:graph && pnpm run clean:wasm:orchestrator
scripts.test:wasm: pnpm --filter @vizij/animation-wasm run test && pnpm --filter @vizij/node-graph-wasm run test && pnpm --filter @vizij/orchestrator-wasm run test
scripts.link:value-json: pnpm --filter @vizij/value-json run build && (cd npm/@vizij/value-json && pnpm link --global)
scripts.link:wasm: pnpm run link:value-json && pnpm run link:wasm:animation && pnpm run link:wasm:graph && pnpm run link:wasm:orchestrator
scripts.build: pnpm run build:rust && pnpm run build:wasm && pnpm run build:shared
scripts.test: pnpm run test:rust && pnpm run test:wasm && pnpm run test:shared
scripts.clean: pnpm run clean:shared && pnpm run clean:wasm
scripts.release: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm run build:wasm && pnpm run build:shared
